name: Anjali Kumari
tagline: Translating complex data into clear, compelling, and impactful visual stories.
about: A creative strategist specializing in infographic design, data visualization, and visual communication. Currently pursuing B.Tech in CSE, I bridge the gap between complex data and human understanding through intuitive design and structured storytelling. I leverage AI workflows and modern design tools to create high-impact visual content for digital and print platforms.

projects.title: Business Growth Strategy
projects.description: A 5-step circular process infographic visualizing a company's scaling strategy, from market research to full-scale operations.

projects.title: Product Development Cycle
projects.description: A professional circular infographic showcasing the lifecycle of a product, focusing on the iterative design and testing phases.

projects.title: Marketing Funnel Breakdown
projects.description: A segmented circular visualization of the modern marketing funnel, designed for clear presentation in corporate reports.

projects.title: Team Workflow Process
projects.description: A high-quality circular infographic illustrating the collaborative workflow between design and development teams.

experience.description: Engineered responsive UI components and integrated RESTful APIs for eCommerce systems, focusing on data clarity and user-centric navigation.
Participated in hands-on development using Java, Spring Boot, and React. Contributed to building structured data-driven web applications.
